title: acer dasycarpum f. lutescens
intro: Acer dasycarpum f. lutescens, also known as the paperbark maple, is a cultivar of the paperbark maple tree, native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acer dasycarpum f. lutescens include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. The plant can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its purported health benefits.
